issue.title: Design: glass-morphism card depth — soft shadows, subtle gradients, premium feel
issue.description: Add CSS glass-morphism effects to cards: soft shadows, subtle gradients, backdrop blur. Benchmark: Linear.app and Raycast landing pages for the level of polish we want. Spec the exact CSS properties (backdrop-filter, box-shadow, border, background) and any hover/focus states.

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
